top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer cites the verse's specific lexical signature explicitly: saṁyamya and prajñā pratiṣṭhitā appear in the engineering body, and the structural claim (restrain the senses AND remain yoked, intent on the supreme; both halves required) maps to the verse's two pādas. The named-tools stack (Slack, GitHub, Postgres) is verse-appropriate. No other verse in the Gita has this specific lexical chain.
